schema.name: high_score
schema.description: Stores high scores for the 3D endless tunnel survival game.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for each high score entry.

compliance.reason: Internal unique identifier for the record.

fields.name: data_creator
fields.description: id of the user who creates the record

compliance.reason: Internal user identifier for tracking purposes.

fields.name: data_updater
fields.description: id of the user who updates the record

compliance.reason: Internal user identifier for tracking purposes.
Timestamp of the high score achievement is public.

fields.name: player_name
fields.description: The display name of the player who achieved the score.

compliance.reason: Player name is public on the leaderboard.

fields.name: score
fields.description: The final score achieved by the player.

compliance.reason: Score is a key public component of the leaderboard.

fields.name: level_reached
fields.description: The highest level reached by the player in that run.

compliance.reason: Level reached is public on the leaderboard.

fields.name: time_survived
fields.description: The total time survived by the player in milliseconds.

compliance.reason: Time survived is public on the leaderboard.
